network.scope: Task-scoped read-only preflight and capability inventory against the operator-selected GEOFlow instance or channel target declared in security/network_policy.json.
network.reason: Running-system and channel work needs current capability evidence before mutation; host, protocol, response-size, timeout, credential, and output boundaries are explicitly constrained.

file_write.scope: User-selected discovery report output; preview, publish-as-new, or confirmed replace operations inside a resolved GEOFlow theme workspace; Laravel backups under storage/app/private; legacy backups in a dedicated mode-0700 child of an explicitly selected persistent parent outside the web workspace; temporary preflight response files; and exact-contract Codex Skill staging with persistent backup of the current and retired Skill directories.
file_write.reason: The unified skill needs bounded local writes for capability reports, theme edit sessions, redacted preflight processing, and clean installation; theme identifiers and filesystem entries are validated, replacements require confirmation and rollback-capable staging, and persistent backups precede live replacement or Skill switching.

target_enforcement.openai: SKILL.md guardrails and explicit CLI confirmation contract

target_enforcement.generic: SKILL.md guardrails and explicit CLI confirmation contract
target_enforcement.vscode: SKILL.md guardrails and explicit CLI confirmation contract

subprocess.scope: Argument-list invocation of local php artisan geoflow:frontend-experience for read-only channel capability and sync-preview reports.
subprocess.reason: Channel frontend comparison requires current application evidence; subprocess calls use fixed command arguments, capture JSON output, and do not use a shell.
